headline: Equity Residential Q2 FFO Beats Estimates, Coastal Demand Lifts Results
summary: EQR tops Q2 FFO estimates, lifts its same-store revenue and NOI outlook and highlights stronger leasing trends led by San Francisco and New York.

raw.headline: Equity Residential Q2 FFO Beats Estimates, Coastal Demand Lifts Results
raw.summary: EQR tops Q2 FFO estimates, lifts its same-store revenue and NOI outlook and highlights stronger leasing trends led by San Francisco and New York.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Equity Residential, Lowers Price Target to $70
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $71 to $70.
